notes.text: This module is a policy and structuring simulator, not a live market quote engine.
Expected loss, market multiple, payout ladders, and bond size options are illustrative assumptions unless explicitly sourced elsewhere.
The calculator is intended to compare sovereign disaster financing structures, not to provide a final underwriting or investor term sheet.
